title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Gradeup - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Gradeup - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Gradeup invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Curriculum Developer at our Thane location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Gradeup:
Gradeup is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Educational Technology

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Gradeup!
